title: tetradium sambucinum
intro: Tetradium sambucinum, also known as Chinese Evodia or Fuzi, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, Tetradium sambucinum has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar and blood pressure levels. The health benefits of Tetradium sambucinum include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to aid in weight loss and improve immune function. Tetradium sambucinum is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by boiling the roots and leaves in water or extracting the active compounds using solvents.
